payload.answer: Inspect requested for memory mem_123, but no stored memory payload is available in this fixture to display or evaluate.

entity_resolution.reason: No memory content was provided for mem_123 in the fixture input; punctuation in the command does not add durable memory.

details: No memory cards were generated from the inspect command alone.

repair_options: Provide the memory record for mem_123 to inspect its fields, provenance, and current/superseded status.
If mem_123 was deleted or superseded, include its audit metadata so it can be reported without presenting it as current.
